prestazioni: MR20DD (2.0L Direct Injection I4) engine: Full bolt-on turbo kit using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, HKS Hi-Power exhaust system, and a Cobb Accessport V3 flashed with a custom Stage 2+ tune (220+ HP, 210+ lb-ft torque) on 93 octane fuel

KW Suspension Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, custom spring rates (Front: 8K, Rear: 7K), and adjustable top mounts for camber correction, paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings

Nissan Juke Nismo RS front brake kit (320mm rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid, paired with stainless steel braided lines and a custom brake cooling duct setup using Mishimoto universal ducts
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Rogue Sport-specific fitment) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, extended rocker panels, and a rear diffuser, finished in Nissan 'Passion Red' with a 3M Matte Black wrap on the roof and pillars

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with a custom vented design (MR20DD-specific heat extraction) and a custom front splitter from Rocket Bunny (Pandem) with adjustable canards and a 3-piece aluminum undertray for improved aerodynamics

Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), paired with custom extended wheel studs (12x1.25) and Project Kics R40 lug nuts
